phonetic: n蓴藧藞胃忙mpt蓹n蕛蓹(r); n蓴藧胃藞h忙mpt蓹n蕛蓹(r)
meaning: 鍖楀畨鏅暒閮鑻卞浗鑻辨牸鍏伴儭鍚峕
examples: A shot of a pheasant in golden December sunlight in Northamptonshire, UK.
He leaves Northamptonshire so soon, that even this slight sacrifice cannot be often demanded.
Almost everything a racing team needs can be found without leaving Oxfordshire or Northamptonshire.
The Conservatives have retained control of Northamptonshire County Council in the 2013 local elections.
Northamptonshire County Council sent out letters earlier this year to staff detailing the changes.
